description: Account Router Missing Procedures & Update Fix. (1) Update procedure silently drops revenue/employees/industry/parentAccountId fields accepted by schema (B-08). (2) accountListResponseSchema uses 'data' key but router returns 'accounts' — mismatch (B-09). (3) No updateRevenue procedure — domain Account.updateRevenue() unreachable via API (B-10). (4) No updateEmployeeCount procedure (B-11). (5) No categorizeIndustry procedure (B-12). (6) mapAccountToResponse returns raw WebsiteUrl value object instead of string (B-13). Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md section 12.

wiring_complete.target: All schema fields persist on update; 3 new procedures functional

notes: Account domain wiring audit finding. See docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md.
